\tzpentry{ID4025}{Zeta-Regularized Potential Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4025 introduces Zeta-Regularized Potential Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\\n \\\\kappa_{CV} := \\\\lim_{n \\\\to \\\\infty} \\\\frac{1}{n} \\\\sum_{i=1}^n \\\\Omega_i^?\\n \\\\quad \\\\text{and} \\\\quad\\n \\\\hat{V} := \\\\{\\\\zeta_i\\\\}\\n \\\\]
